attacking_style: Insufficient data to establish attacking pattern. Single ITT performance shows GC capability but no attacking behavior observed.
team_tactics: CCC appeared to adapt tactics when Bevan emerged as GC contender via ITT, suggesting flexible team strategy rather than predetermined setup.
terrain_preference: Strong time trialist capable of gaining significant GC positions against the clock. Mountain and stage race durability unknown from available data.
vulnerability: Unknown whether ITT strength translates to mountain defense or multi-week consistency. Single-race sample prevents identifying weaknesses.
key_patterns: Emerged from domestique role to GC contention unexpectedly via strong ITT performance
Time trial specialist capable of major GC leaps in Grand Tour context
form_trajectory: unknown: Only one race observation showing strong ITT form, insufficient data to assess trajectory or consistency
